basics.name: Sebastian Romero Laguna
basics.label: Software Engineer | Full-Stack & Security
basics.summary: Software Engineer with professional experience since 2017, working across full-stack web development, application security, and cloud infrastructure. Holds a Master of Information Technology (Cybersecurity) from CQUniversity, Australia (graduated 2025, GPA 5.786/7.0). Has worked across startup, enterprise, and academic settings in Colombia, the United States, and Australia. Currently working as a Software Developer (contractor) at PRX Vault, Brisbane.

work.name: PRX Vault
work.summary: Full-stack development on a consumer cashback and rewards platform.

Software Engineer: Migrated merchant search from a client-side JavaScript implementation to a server-side PostgreSQL Full-Text Search system (BM25 ranking, GIN index), eliminating full dataset downloads on page load and improving multi-word query accuracy by approximately 40%.
Built a cashback merchant detail page with a visual timeline, tips grid, and a collapsible exclusions accordion backed by a keyword scoring heuristic.
Reduced session-level image resolution failures per user by redesigning the logo resolution strategy from a multi-candidate cascade to a two-step fallback.
Achieved front-end accessibility compliance across interactive components (keyboard navigation, prefers-reduced-motion, eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y).
DevOps: Improved mobile page load performance by converting production images to WebP format; conducted Next.js bundle analysis to identify and scope performance bottlenecks.
Designed the architectural blueprint for standardising Supabase Edge Functions with consistent middleware, authentication, and validation patterns.
Leadership: Conducted a platform security audit identifying vulnerabilities across authentication and data access layers; authored a remediation report and security roadmap presented to engineering leadership.
Authored Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for major platform changes, documenting rationale, trade-offs, and implementation plans.
Delivered features under agile methodologies using Jira and Confluence.

work.name: Platform Recipes
work.summary: Full-stack software development using modern JavaScript frameworks and agile delivery.

Software Engineer: Developed and maintained features using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Contributed to front-end and back-end development across the platform's product suite.
Leadership: Collaborated on task planning and delivery under agile methodologies.

work.name: Platform Recipes
work.summary: DevOps tooling, CLI development, and infrastructure work.

DevOps: Evaluated AWS EKS, AKS, GCP, and Rancher for container orchestration through proof-of-concept work.
Created and managed Kubernetes clusters using kubectl for application deployment and scaling tests.
Updated Infrastructure as Code using Terraform to maintain current provisioning standards.
Configured Kubernetes add-ons including External DNS and Argo CD.
Software Engineer: Led the design and development of a cross-platform CLI application in Go for scanning repository dependencies via the GitHub API.
Used SQLite for storing metadata retrieved from API queries within the CLI tool.
Wrote SQL queries to analyse information gathered via the GitHub API.
Developed features for platform.recipes to enable web presentation of content from structured raw formats.
Leadership: Used Jira and Confluence for task management and developed Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).

work.name: CQUniversity
work.summary: Representing the university and guiding prospective students.

Leadership: Provides information and guidance to prospective domestic and international students regarding CQUniversity courses.
Helps students select suitable degrees by reviewing their academic background and interests.
Responds to student inquiries about university programmes, campus life, and application processes.

work.name: NEO Software Development
work.summary: Founded and led a software services company, managing client projects and a small development team.

Leadership: Managed a small software development team across client projects, handling task assignment and delivery.
Secured a competitive grant (Ecopetrol Emprende) for young business entrepreneurs.
Ran a mentorship programme for team members covering business and software development practices.
Software Engineer: Led the design and implementation of an event management software solution.
Delivered full-stack development projects for a US-based client, including REST APIs.
Used PostgreSQL on AWS RDS for cloud-hosted application data storage.
Data: Analysed product sales data using SQL queries to extract business insights.

work.name: Avalanche Industries
work.summary: Automation and back-end development for a US-based logistics and retail company.

Software Engineer: Automated periodic data import processes from PDF to Excel using Power Query M, reducing manual processing time by over 4 hours per week.
Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication flows to integrate with the Amazon Seller Partner API.
Wrote unit tests to verify code functionality and prevent regressions.
Performed software maintenance, identifying and resolving bugs in in-house applications.
Data: Used MySQL to generate reports for business decision-making.
IT Support: Assembled and tracked GPU-based computing hardware.
Provided IT support across departments, covering printers, surveillance systems, and software and hardware installations.

work.name: Salisbury University
work.summary: Data processing and database work within a university research context.

Data: Executed ETL cycles to gather and compile data from multiple sources.
Cleaned and consolidated information from disparate sources into a single database.
Designed and implemented a database structure for efficient information storage.
Developed SQL queries to extract insights tailored to diverse university community needs.

work.name: Logical Software Factory
work.summary: Cloud infrastructure optimisation and security configuration.

DevOps: Contributed to a reduction of over 75% in cloud infrastructure costs through implementation of AWS Reserved Instances.
Deployed web applications on AWS EC2 instances using Docker containers.
Managed DNS routing and application scalability using AWS Route 53.
Implemented and managed AWS Security Group rules and Network ACLs to harden the cloud environment.

work.name: Nivelics SAS
work.summary: Back-end API development and enterprise system integration.

Software Engineer: Improved internal data flow by developing REST API integrations with an external SAP system.
Developed and maintained REST APIs with encryption and decryption for data security.
Implemented document upload functionality via API endpoints.
Built a Content Management System using Vue.js.
DevOps: Used AWS S3 for object storage and EC2 for application hosting.
Implemented AWS CodeCommit for Git-based version control.

work.name: Cold Chain Colombia SAS
work.summary: Led the development of a Computerised Maintenance Management System (CMMS) and digital transformation initiatives.

Leadership: Led the team responsible for developing and maintaining a real-time web and mobile platform for help desk ticket management.
Oversaw the company's Computerised Maintenance Management System (CMMS) across web and mobile platforms.
Software Engineer: Designed and developed a role-based access control (RBAC) system for the maintenance platform.
Implemented QR code-based identification and tracking of managed machinery.
Delivered web and mobile applications used by customers, technicians, and management.
Data: Transformed help desk ticket data into business insights through data analysis.
Systematised maintenance reporting procedures, reducing printed paper usage by 87%.

Software Engineer: Developed and implemented an e-commerce channel using WordPress and WooCommerce.
Optimised website performance through security enhancements and loading speed improvements, contributing to documented growth in the user base.
Developed landing pages for seasonal promotions, contributing to over 50% growth in platform revenue.
Implemented custom SQL and Laravel solutions to optimise internal software.

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Custom web application development for various clients using PHP and Laravel.

Software Engineer: Designed, developed, and maintained custom web applications to client specifications using PHP and the Laravel framework.
Delivered web application solutions meeting agreed functional requirements.
Developed front-end interfaces using Vue.js.

work.name: Cold Chain Colombia SAS
work.summary: Full-stack development for internal maintenance systems.

Software Engineer: Transitioned company information management from paper and spreadsheets to a centralised web-based CMMS solution.
Designed and developed a role-based access control (RBAC) system for the maintenance platform.
Developed data visualisation components presenting key performance indicators and adaptive graphs.

courses: Focus: Machine Learning for COVID-19 Risk Factor Analysis
Distinction: Participation in an International Conference

services.name: AI Integration & Workflow Automation Strategy
services.description: Strategic advisory for businesses looking to leverage Generative AI and automation. I assess your current workflows, identify high-impact opportunities for AI integration, and design a strategic roadmap for implementation. This includes selecting the right AI tools (like Copilot, Gemini, and other agentic systems), defining spec-driven development processes, and ensuring your team is equipped to build and maintain AI-powered solutions efficiently.

services.name: Cloud-Native Architecture & Design
services.description: Architectural design for building scalable, resilient, and cost-effective applications on AWS. I work with your team to design microservices architectures, define practices for serverless computing, and create a blueprint for your cloud infrastructure aligned with your long-term business goals and security requirements.

services.name: Infrastructure as Code & CI/CD Pipeline Implementation
services.description: I build and configure cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines using modern DevOps practices. This service includes writing Terraform code to manage AWS resources and setting up automated CI/CD workflows with GitHub Actions for reliable, repeatable deployments.

services.name: Custom CLI & Automation Tool Development
services.description: Development of custom command-line interface (CLI) tools and automation scripts in Go to address your team's specific challenges. Whether for automating deployments, managing infrastructure, or simplifying complex workflows, I build cross-platform tools that improve engineering efficiency.

services.name: REST API & Microservices Implementation
services.description: Back-end development focused on building secure, well-documented REST APIs and microservices. Using Go and modern frameworks, I implement services designed for scalability and maintainability.

services.name: Full-Stack Web Development
services.description: End-to-end web application development using modern technologies. From front-end interfaces with React and TypeScript to back-end systems in Go or Python, deployed on AWS infrastructure.

awards.title: Nexo Global Scholar & Youth Researcher
awards.summary: Selected through a competitive national process for the Nexo Global grant to conduct research at Salisbury University. Recognised as a Youth Researcher by the Ministry of Science, Colombia.

awards.summary: Secured a competitive grant for young business entrepreneurs to develop core business activities.

publications.name: Unified System of Management of Medical Appointment System for Colombia
publications.publisher: Posters on the Bay (Council on Undergraduate Research)
publications.summary: Selected to present research on a unified medical appointment system at the Posters on the Bay exhibition to Maryland state legislators and university administrators.

publications.name: Machine Learning Analysis of COVID-19 Mortality Risk Factors
publications.summary: Research identifying risk factors for COVID-19 mortality in Colombia using Python and graph clustering on official public health data.

projects.name: IoT Classroom Moisture Sensors System
projects.description: IoT system connected to physical moisture sensors deployed across CQUniversity campuses in Rockhampton, Brisbane, Melbourne, and Sydney. Used Docker to run a cloud broker with secure data transmission.
highlights: Maintained physical sensors for university-wide student access.
Implemented security measures for data transmission between sensors and the cloud broker.

projects.name: Evolution Strategy Project
projects.description: Implementation of Evolution Strategy algorithms for optimisation problems.
highlights: Applied evolutionary computation principles to solve complex optimisation tasks.

projects.name: Hyperparameter Optimisation of CNN
projects.description: Report on hyperparameter optimisation of a CNN for image classification using PSO, Grid Search, and Random Search.
highlights: Compared Particle Swarm Optimisation (PSO), Grid Search, and Random Search for tuning CNN hyperparameters.
Analysed performance metrics to determine the most effective optimisation strategy.

projects.name: Cross-Platform Dependency Scanner CLI Tool
projects.description: Command-line tool in Go for scanning repository dependencies via the GitHub API, designed for use in DevOps workflows and CI/CD pipelines.
highlights: Built for portability across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
Used SQLite for local data storage and Go concurrency primitives.

projects.name: Bakery Invoice Generator
projects.description: Full-stack invoice generation application for small businesses.
highlights: Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and SQLite.
Containerised with Docker for local or cloud deployment.

projects.name: Lingua Verse
projects.description: Language learning web application using the Gemini API to provide conceptual feedback on user answers and explain underlying concepts.
highlights: Integrated the Gemini API for generative feedback on user responses.
Implemented retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) style functionality to contextualise corrections.
